title.en: AUTOMATIC CONTROL, STARTING, SYNCHRONISATION OR STABILISATION OF GENERATORS OF ELECTRONIC OSCILLATIONS OR PULSES (generation of oscillations H03B)
Stabilisation of generator output against variations of physical values, e.g. power supply
against variations of temperature only

of power

using a frequency discriminator comprising a passive frequency-determining element
using a reference signal applied to a frequency- or phase-locked loop
using a reference signal directly applied to the generator
using energy levels of molecules, atoms, or subatomic particles as a frequency reference
Automatic control not provided for in other groups of this subclass
Indexing scheme relating to automatic control of frequency or phase and to synchronisation
Modifications for maintaining constant the phase-locked loop damping factor when other loop parameters change
Compensating for non-linear characteristics of the controlled oscillator

Modifications of the phase-locked loop for ensuring constant frequency when the power supply fails or is interrupted, e.g. for saving power
Indirect frequency synthesis using a frequency multiplier in the phase-locked loop or in the reference signal path
Indirect frequency synthesis using a mixer in the phase-locked loop
Preventing false-lock or pseudo-lock of the PLL
Temporarily disabling, deactivating or stopping the frequency counter or divider
